title: Bostik Extra Strong Glu Dots Clear - 64 Dots Pack - Double Sided Adhesive for Instant Fixing & Crafts - Easy to Use - No Mess
features: Extra strong, double-sided clear glue dots – perfect for instant fixing and craft projects
Stick to almost anything, including paper, wood, plastic, metal, glass and painted surfaces
No mess, easy to use, acid and lignin free and non-yellowing
Ideal for gift wrapping, photo albums, craft projects and instant fixing
Contents: Bostik Extra Strong Glu Dots - Extra Strong, Double-Sided Glue Dots, For Instant Fixing & Crafts, Easy to Use, No Mess, Clear, x64 Glu Dots
description: From the manufacturer Bostik Extra Strong Glu Dots Extra strong sticky dots of glue for instant fixing Bostik Extra Strong Glu Dots are circles of clear extra strong glue that stick to almost anything, including paper, wood, plastic, metal, glass and painted surfaces. Easy to use, acid and lignin free and non-yellowing, they are ideal for gift wrapping, photo albums, craft projects and instant fixing. Suitable uses Suitable for glass, photos, posters, crafts and much more – perfect for instant fixing and crafts.
